name: PublishHtmlTab
author: ranouf
helpMarkDown: Publishes an HTML report or a report directory into the Azure DevOps build results experience.

inputs.name: tabName
inputs.label: Report tab name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name displayed for the published report inside the extension viewer.

inputs.name: reportDir
inputs.label: HTML file or directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a single HTML file or to a directory whose contents are published recursively.

inputs.name: enableDownloadAll
inputs.label: Enable full report download
inputs.helpMarkDown: When enabled, the task creates a .zip archive of the published HTML file or directory and exposes a download button in the extension viewer.
